llm_response:
Subject: Request for Extension on Upcoming Project Submission

Dear Professor Smith,

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension for the group project currently due in two days. I sincerely apologize for approaching you with this request so close to the deadline, as I understand the importance of adhering to all academic timelines. Unfortunately, unforeseen complications have arisen that are preventing our team from completing the final revisions by the original deadline. Specifically, one of our key team members has been hospitalized unexpectedly, which has severely disrupted our workflow and prevented us from finalizing the data analysis section we had planned to complete yesterday. We have worked diligently to manage this situation, but the loss of their immediate contribution has created a significant bottleneck that we cannot resolve within the remaining forty-eight hours. We believe that a short extension would allow us to maintain the high quality of work you expect from our class while ensuring we submit a complete and thoughtful project. We are committed to finishing this assignment to the best of our ability and would greatly appreciate your consideration of this request. Thank you for your time and understanding regarding this difficult circumstance.

Sincerely,

Jordan Lee
